name: Survival's End
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>存</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>境</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Destroy as many Normal Monsters on the field as possible, and if you do, Special Summon Level 4 or lower Dinosaur monsters from your Deck, up to the number destroyed, but destroy them during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Dinosaur monster you control and 1 card your opponent controls; destroy them.
eff: Destroy as many Normal Monsters on the field as possible, and if you do, Special Summon Level 4 or lower Dinosaur monsters from your Deck, up to the number destroyed, but destroy them during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Dinosaur monster you control and 1 card your opponent controls; destroy them.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
